Container.Name: ripuz
Container.Overview: Self-hosted Qobuz music downloader for UNRAID. Downloads playlists at your chosen quality tier, tags with MusicBrainz Picard, and files tracks into your library as Artist/Album/Title.FLAC.
Container.Description: Ripuz downloads your Qobuz library content using your own subscription and auth token, tags with headless MusicBrainz Picard, and organises files into Artist/Album/Title.FLAC. Supports individual tracks, albums, playlists, and full discographies. Quality is configurable from MP3 320kbps to FLAC 24-bit/192kHz in the Settings UI.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Ripuz web interface.

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: Ripuz config, database, and qobuz-dl credentials.

Config.Name: Downloads
Config.Description: Scratch space for in-progress downloads (a fast/cache drive is ideal).

Config.Name: Music Library
Config.Description: Your music library root — files land here as Artist/Album/Title.FLAC.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID to run as (UNRAID nobody = 99).

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID to run as (UNRAID users = 100).

Config.Name: Basic Auth User
Config.Description: HTTP Basic Auth username (set RIPUZ_AUTH_PASS to enable auth).

Config.Name: Basic Auth Pass
Config.Description: HTTP Basic Auth password — leave empty to disable.

Config.Name: Picard Timeout
Config.Description: Seconds to wait for Picard to finish tagging a batch (600 = 10 min).
